detected_risks.description: No evidence provided for evasion assessment.
detected_risks.mitigation: Add adversarial prompt suites, delimiter hardening, and tool-use policies that resist injected instructions.

detected_risks.description: No evidence provided for poison assessment.
detected_risks.mitigation: Scan training data for triggers, audit fine-tuning sets, and run trigger-response red-team evaluations.

detected_risks.description: No evidence provided for privacy-inf assessment.
detected_risks.mitigation: Run memorization and extraction tests, redact sensitive data, and enforce output filtering for PII.

detected_risks.description: No evidence provided for redteam assessment.
detected_risks.mitigation: Maintain a recurring red-team program for jailbreaks, dual-use prompts, and unsafe tool actions.

detected_risks.description: No evidence provided for fairness assessment.
detected_risks.mitigation: Add fairness evaluations, protected-class test sets, and review thresholds for discriminatory outputs.

detected_risks.description: No evidence provided for robustness assessment.
detected_risks.mitigation: Test prompt perturbations, typos, multilingual variants, and refusal consistency under noisy inputs.

detected_risks.description: No evidence provided for transparency assessment.
detected_risks.mitigation: Publish model cards, intended-use limits, escalation rules, and operator-facing documentation.

detected_risks.description: No evidence provided for explainability assessment.
detected_risks.mitigation: Provide rationale templates, confidence disclosures, and review workflows for high-impact outputs.

detected_risks.description: No evidence provided for privacy assessment.
detected_risks.mitigation: Document data lineage, retention limits, access control, and privacy-preserving guardrails.

recommended_action: Provide evidence for claimed safeguards and close the highest-scoring protocol gaps before approval.
